title: fragaria multifida
intro: Fragaria multifida, also known as the alpine strawberry or strawberry-like plant, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America and Eurasia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and ascorbic acid, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fragaria multifida include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Fragaria multifida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
